name: private-zones
title: GCP DNS — Private Managed Zones
summary: Creates private Cloud DNS managed zones — plain (with record sets), forwarding (queries delegated to target name servers), or peering (namespace delegated to another VPC) — with VPC visibility lists and labels.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory labels.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased). Mandatory labels win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID owning the DNS zones.

module.name: private_zones
module.type: map(object({ domain_name = string description = optional(string, "Managed by Terraform") network_self_links = list(string) forwarding_targets = optional(list(object({ ipv4_address = string forwarding_path = optional(string, "default") })), []) peering_network_self_link = optional(string) records = optional(map(object({ name = string type = string ttl = optional(number, 300) rrdatas = list(string) })), {}) }))
module.description: Map of private managed zones keyed by logical name. domain_name requires a trailing dot. A zone may be a plain private zone (records), a forwarding zone (forwarding_targets), or a peering zone (peering_network_self_link) — these modes are mutually exclusive per GCP API.

outputs.name: zone_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical zone name to managed zone ID.

outputs.name: zone_names
outputs.description: Map of logical zone name to DNS domain name (with trailing dot).

outputs.name: zone_resource_names
outputs.description: Map of logical zone name to the GCP zone resource name (needed by record sets created elsewhere).

outputs.name: record_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<zone-key>/<record-key>' to record set ID.
